name: Girls Party In Need Of 4th
description:
Three girls approach you at the adventurer's guild. They need a fourth member to take on a lucrative quest. But, why would a quest so simple pay so much?

The party consists of:

  • Silis, the blonde lancer.

  • Tela, the redhead fighter and leader.

  • Alessa, the brunette mage.

Content warning: violence.
creator: KalzK
